[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010110010 4
1 001100101 4
2 101010111 6
3 100110111 6
4 101111011 7
5 101010010 4
6 001110011 5
7 010011000 3

01 10 101110011 6
12 21 011111011 7
23 32 010111010 5
34 43 011110111 7
45 54 101110111 7
56 65 101110111 7
67 76 101111111 8
70 07 101111011 7 match 4

02 20 111011010 6
13 31 011110011 6
24 42 011111101 7
35 53 111110111 8
46 64 101110111 7
57 75 101111111 8
60 06 101110111 7
71 17 101111011 7 match 4

03 30 111110010 6
14 41 001110111 6
25 52 111011111 8
36 63 110110111 7
47 74 101111111 8
50 05 101010111 6 match 2
61 16 101110111 7
72 27 111111011 8

04 40 101110111 7
15 51 101110111 7
26 62 110111111 8
37 73 111111011 8
